text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the practice match, two Umamusume walk
home together with troubled expressions.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
The first time we raced them, I thought they were
pushovers, but... they were really something else
today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith won the practice match, but only by
a hair, proving how far our team has come since
the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And while it's good to have her back, Director
Akikawa has decided to merely observe Ms.
Kashimoto's methods without taking any action.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The status quo remains unchanged at the
academy, and the days pass steeped in anxiety
and uncertainty...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What could the director be thinking? What's
going to happen to our school?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! We'll be okay!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All we gotta do is win the Unity Cup. Right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our spirits thus lifted, we get back to training in
earnest.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Fuku, you're so close to breaking your record!
Go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! L-lucky daaash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unbeknownst to us, someone is watching us as we
train.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I feel so much more motivated when I'm with
them! They're the best team I could ever ask for!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... She feels more motivated just because
she's in a team?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Fancy seeing you here, Little Cocon!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
The same thing you're doing. Scouting out the
competition. I'd hate to be caught off guard when
it's time to face off against them.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
The main impression I get is that they're the
complete opposite of us. Always cheering each
other on and stuff...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
The things they see as strengths are things that
our team has deliberately avoided... It makes me
wonder who's really in the right.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Anyway, what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon averts her gaze at Bitter Glasse's
question.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with Trainer Kashimoto's
program. We've improved a lot thanks to her.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite all their messing around and not
taking things seriously...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: This lot has improved far more than we have.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to figure out what exactly they have
that we don't, but...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: You couldn't come up with an answer?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I couldn't—I just didn't want to
believe what it was...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon lifts her face, her brows creased with
concern.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Crap, they're coming this way. Let's beat it.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So you're saying we've unconsciously put
caps on our own potential?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: In short, yes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Little Cocon sighs quietly.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We have faith in Trainer Kashimoto's detailed
training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But because we believe in it so wholeheartedly,
we've fooled ourselves into thinking that simply
following her program will be enough to make us
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: In contrast, the other team was able to overcome their limits because they lost before. They work hard for the sake of their teammates.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Huh... So it's more of a joint effort for them, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse falls silent for a while, then looks at
Little Cocon with a gleam in her eye.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try copying them and start training
together as a team too, then?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way that would work. First of all, I
don't consider any of you "friends."

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Ouch, that's harsh! All right, then what do
you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Well... I don't think it's just me. Going above and
beyond for the sake of "friendship" doesn't seem
like our style, does it?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But... we might just be able to push our limits if
it's for Trainer Kashimoto's sake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after this conversation, Team Zenith
holds a secret meeting at the stress stump.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's been brought up to speed, right? And
we're all in agreement?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her teammates nod with solemn
expressions, Little Cocon takes out a notebook.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Its pages are filled with meticulously recorded
details of past training sessions, including their
dates and improvements made in each one.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to expand on Trainer Kashimoto's
program, I figured we need to fully understand it
first, so I did my own analysis.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Turns out it's more detailed than I realized. She's
been adjusting the intensity of every session
based on everyone's condition and progress.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
I always knew that Trainer Kashimoto was special,
but I can't believe how meticulous all her
calculations are...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
The more I learn about her, the more amazed I am
by how skilled she is at managing us—how deeply
she understands us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rest of the team nod in agreement at Bitter
Glasse's words.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But we have to shatter her preconceptions of
what she thinks is our 100% and work until we
reach 120% of our potential!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
So long as we remain trapped within the realm of
her expectations, we'll never achieve anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith begins their secret training the next
day.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff! Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Phew, it's tough to do extra training after a busy
day... My legs are so heavy, and I'm sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Cut the complaining. I bet you have enough
energy to run another lap or two, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Course I do!
